name: Metro Auto Pawn & Sales
description_short: Metro Auto Pawn & Sales is an Oklahoma City auto pawn shop offering title-based loans, used vehicle financing, and vehicle trading with over 18 years of experience and no credit checks required.
description_long:
Metro Auto Pawn & Sales has been operating in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma for over 18 years as a specialized auto pawn shop. The company is located at 1630 N. MacArthur Boulevard and positions itself as a trusted provider of quick cash and vehicle financing solutions for consumers in the local area.

The company offers three primary services: auto pawning (receiving cash against a vehicle's title with no credit check), used car sales with in-house financing for customers with poor credit, and vehicle trading services. They emphasize fast access to cash without lengthy approval processes, allowing customers to address immediate financial needs like rent, food, or other obligations. Their used car inventory includes vehicles in various categories—cars, vans, trucks, and SUVs—priced affordably with financing options available from as low as $500 down.

Metro Auto Pawn & Sales distinguishes itself through on-site vehicle financing that does not require a credit check, making it accessible to consumers with blemished credit reports or no credit history. They combine traditional pawn shop services with used car sales, offering both asset-based lending and vehicle sales under one roof. The company operates with extended business hours (9 AM–6 PM weekdays, 9 AM–5 PM Saturday) and provides direct phone and email contact options.

As a pawn shop, the company operates within a high-cost lending model typical of the auto pawn industry. While they offer speed and accessibility, customers should understand that title-based loans carry risk of vehicle loss if loans are not repaid. The website lacks transparent disclosure of interest rates, fees, loan terms, or specific financing conditions, which is important information for consumers considering this type of collateral-based lending.
address: 1630 N MacArthur Blvd, Oklahoma City, OK 73127

company_info.headquarters: 1630 N MacArthur Blvd, Oklahoma City, OK 73127

pros: No credit check required for auto pawn loans, making it accessible to consumers with poor or no credit history
Over 18 years of operating experience in the Oklahoma City market
On-site vehicle financing available, eliminating need to secure separate financing elsewhere
Quick cash access without waiting days or weeks for approval
Used car inventory available for purchase with low down payments starting at $500
Vehicle trading option allows customers to exchange current vehicles for different ones
Extended business hours (weekdays until 6 PM, Saturday service available)
cons: No transparent disclosure of interest rates, APR, or loan terms on the website
As a title loan provider, loans put vehicle ownership at risk if repayment defaults occur
Limited information about repayment terms, fees, or what happens if a customer cannot repay
No mention of alternative loan products or comparison of pricing to other lenders
Website contains placeholder text and incomplete content suggesting outdated maintenance
best_for: Consumers with poor credit or no credit history who need vehicle financing
People facing immediate cash needs who can use their vehicle title as collateral
Buyers seeking affordable used vehicles with flexible down payment options
Consumers interested in trading an existing vehicle for a different one quickly
diagnosis: Metro Auto Pawn & Sales is best suited for consumers with poor credit or immediate financial needs who own a vehicle and can accept collateral-based lending terms. However, the critical caveat is that auto pawn loans risk vehicle loss if not repaid, and the company's website provides no transparent disclosure of interest rates, fees, or repayment terms—information essential before entering into any loan agreement.
services: Auto pawning with cash advances against vehicle titles
Title-based loans with no credit check required
Used car sales with on-site financing
Vehicle financing for customers with blemished credit
Used car lot with inventory of cars, vans, trucks, and SUVs
Same-location financial services (pawn and sales combined)
Flexible down payment options on used vehicle purchases
